events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Grammy, Emmy, and Tony Award-winning artist Cyndi Lauper celebrates her 73rd birthday today.

angles.name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
angles.copy: Happy 73rd birthday to the iconic Cyndi Lauper! Still rocking that incredible voice and style.

events.title: Remembering George Michael, would have been 63
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 63rd birthday of the legendary singer-songwriter George Michael, born in 1963.

angles.name: Faith in his music
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael today, who would have been 63. His music continues to move generations.

events.title: 17 years since Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: It's 17 years since the world lost the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who passed away on June 25, 2009, at the age of 50.

angles.name: King of Pop's legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Michael Jackson, 17 years on. His artistry and impact on music and culture remain unmatched.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Peace and Love drummer
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Still spreading peace and love.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday today.

angles.name: Guitar legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the phenomenal Brian May! Those legendary riffs are still as electrifying as ever.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday today.

angles.name: Still got the moves
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the incomparable Mick Jagger! Still proving that age is just a number on stage.

events.title: 45 years since MTV launched
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first video.

angles.name: Radio Star Lives On
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us, is it?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop masterpiece
angles.copy: 32 years of 'Definitely Maybe'! Oasis's debut album is still a Britpop masterpiece. What's your favourite track?

events.title: 57 years since Woodstock
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love, Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for peace, love, and music at Woodstock. What an era!

events.title: 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, 49 years since his passing. His music and legend live on forever.

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: It's 30 years since the influential rapper Tupac Shakur passed away on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25, after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Rhymes
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, 30 years on. His powerful lyrics and legacy continue to resonate.

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, 56 years after we lost a true guitar god.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years of 'Abbey Road'! That album cover is almost as famous as the music within.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Power
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Still delivering those powerful vocals.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The outspoken and iconic voice of Oasis, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday today.

angles.name: As You Were
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll attitude.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's timeless single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 24, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity is as relevant as ever.

events.title: 25 years since the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Remember when the iPod changed everything? It's 25 years since Apple launched the original. What was on your first playlist?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! What's your favourite Bond film or iconic theme tune? Ours is... well, we can't pick just one.

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: Today marks what would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles legend, John Lennon, born in 1940.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Thinking of John Lennon today, who would have been 86. His timeless music and message continue to inspire.
